source.name: Edinburgh-Chemistry-Teaching/Data-driven-chemistry Unit_09 data Section3
source.license: CC-BY-4.0 as declared by the source repository

chemistry.path_length_cm: not declared in downloaded data; assume 1 cm only for molar absorptivity interpretation, not for the empirical slope fit

measurement_model.noise_model: Gaussian absorbance residuals estimated from replicate calibration fit
measurement_model.lambda_star_selection: common wavelength chosen from the maximum mean absorbance of known concentration standards in the visible peak region

admission_checks: spectra files contain wavelength and absorbance columns
known concentration standards are finite and positive
unknown sample C is excluded from calibration and then estimated from the fitted analysis function
calibration design has at least two distinct known concentrations
estimated unknown concentration is inside the known calibration span
mandatory_refusals: molar absorptivity claim without declared path length
